title: taraxacum suberiopodum
intro: Taraxacum suberiopodum, also known as the Korean dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum suberiopodum include its potential to lower cholesterol and blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the leaves and roots to make teas, infusions, or capsules, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
